output_contract.blocking_reasons: list of exact reason tokens from [retention_below_threshold,eligible_n_below_threshold,subgroup_suppression]

public_sources.text: Release requires adjusted retention at least 9.5%, eligible n at least 800, and every disclosed subgroup n at least 50.
Adjusted retained users equal retained users minus identified bots; adjusted retention divides that result by eligible n.
Eligible n 840; retained users 88; identified bots among retained 7; smallest disclosed subgroup n 44.

primary.target: Produce a release record for synthetic cohort Q-8. Choose release, hold, or escalate.
